mapper.select: SELECT W.WORKORDNO, W.ORDDATE, W.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, W.ORDQTY, W.PROCESSCD, W.LINECD, W.SHIFT, W.ORDSTATE, W.CLOSEYN, W.FIXEDYN FROM TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON W.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE W.PAR_WORKORDNO = #{PAR_WORKORDNO} AND W.USEYN = 1 ORDER BY W.ORDDATE, W.ORDpriority

SELECT 'WO' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(WORKORDNO,3) AS INT)),0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) FROM TBL_PROD_WORKORDER WHERE WORKORDNO LIKE 'WO' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_WORKORDER (WORKORDNO, PAR_WORKORDNO, PLANTCD, PROCESSCD, SHIFT, PARTNO, ORDQTY, ORDTYPE, ORDpriority, ORDDATE, LINECD, ORDSTATE, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, REMARK) VALUES (#{WORKORDNO}, #{PAR_WORKORDNO}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PROCESSCD}, #{SHIFT}, #{PARTNO}, #{ORDQTY}, #{ORDTYPE}, #{ORDpriority}, #{ORDDATE}, #{LINECD}, #{ORDSTATE}, 1, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{REMARK})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PROD_WORKORDER SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE(), EDITUSERID = #{EDITUSERID} WHERE WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO}
